cells.english: Most assuredly, I say to you, a servant is not greater than his master; nor is he who is sent greater than he who sent him.
cells.arabic: اَلْحَقَّ الْحَقَّ أَقُولُ لَكُمْ: إِنَّهُ لَيْسَ عَبْدٌ أَعْظَمَ مِنْ سَيِّدِهِ وَلاَ رَسُولٌ أَعْظَمَ مِنْ مُرْسِلِهِ.

cells.english: If you know these things, blessed are you if you do them.
cells.arabic: إِنْ عَلِمْتُمْ هَذَا فَطُوبَاكُمْ إِنْ عَمِلْتُمُوهُ.

cells.english: Jesus spoke these words, lifted up His eyes to heaven, and said: “Father, the hour has come. Glorify Your Son, that Your Son also may glorify You,
cells.arabic: تَكَلَّمَ يَسُوعُ بِهَذَا وَرَفَعَ عَيْنَيْهِ نَحْوَ السَّمَاءِ وَقَالَ: «أَيُّهَا الآبُ قَدْ أَتَتِ السَّاعَةُ. مَجِّدِ ابْنَكَ لِيُمَجِّدَكَ ابْنُكَ أَيْضاً

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: as You have given Him authority over all flesh, that He should give eternal life to as many as You have given Him.
cells.arabic: إِذْ أَعْطَيْتَهُ سُلْطَاناً عَلَى كُلِّ جَسَدٍ لِيُعْطِيَ حَيَاةً أَبَدِيَّةً لِكُلِّ مَنْ أَعْطَيْتَهُ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And this is eternal life, that they may know You, the only true God, and Jesus Christ whom You have sent.
cells.arabic: وَهَذِهِ هِيَ الْحَيَاةُ الأَبَدِيَّةُ: أَنْ يَعْرِفُوكَ أَنْتَ الإِلَهَ الْحَقِيقِيَّ وَحْدَكَ وَيَسُوعَ الْمَسِيحَ الَّذِي أَرْسَلْتَهُ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: I have glorified You on the earth. I have finished the work which You have given Me to do.
cells.arabic: أَنَا مَجَّدْتُكَ عَلَى الأَرْضِ. الْعَمَلَ الَّذِي أَعْطَيْتَنِي لأَعْمَلَ قَدْ أَكْمَلْتُهُ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And now, O Father, glorify Me together with Yourself, with the glory which I had with You before the world was.
cells.arabic: وَالآنَ مَجِّدْنِي أَنْتَ أَيُّهَا الآبُ عِنْدَ ذَاتِكَ بِالْمَجْدِ الَّذِي كَانَ لِي عِنْدَكَ قَبْلَ كَوْنِ الْعَالَمِ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: “I have manifested Your name to the men whom You have given Me out of the world. They were Yours, You gave them to Me, and they have kept Your word.
cells.arabic: «أَنَا أَظْهَرْتُ اسْمَكَ لِلنَّاسِ الَّذِينَ أَعْطَيْتَنِي مِنَ الْعَالَمِ. كَانُوا لَكَ وَأَعْطَيْتَهُمْ لِي وَقَدْ حَفِظُوا كلاَمَكَ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Now they have known that all things which You have given Me are from You.
cells.arabic: وَالآنَ عَلِمُوا أَنَّ كُلَّ مَا أَعْطَيْتَنِي هُوَ مِنْ عِنْدِكَ

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: For I have given to them the words which You have given Me; and they have received them, and have known surely that I came forth from You; and they have believed that You sent Me.
cells.arabic: لأَنَّ الْكلاَمَ الَّذِي أَعْطَيْتَنِي قَدْ أَعْطَيْتُهُمْ وَهُمْ قَبِلُوا وَعَلِمُوا يَقِيناً أَنِّي خَرَجْتُ مِنْ عِنْدِكَ وَآمَنُوا أَنَّكَ أَنْتَ أَرْسَلْتَنِي.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: “I pray for them. I do not pray for the world but for those whom You have given Me, for they are Yours.
cells.arabic: مِنْ أَجْلِهِمْ أَنَا أَسْأَلُ. لَسْتُ أَسْأَلُ مِنْ أَجْلِ الْعَالَمِ بَلْ مِنْ أَجْلِ الَّذِينَ أَعْطَيْتَنِي لأَنَّهُمْ لَكَ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And all Mine are Yours, and Yours are Mine, and I am glorified in them.
cells.arabic: وَكُلُّ مَا هُوَ لِي فَهُوَ لَكَ وَمَا هُوَ لَكَ فَهُوَ لِي وَأَنَا مُمَجَّدٌ فِيهِمْ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Now I am no longer in the world, but these are in the world, and I come to You. Holy Father, keep through Your name those whom You have given Me, that they may be one as We are.
cells.arabic: وَلَسْتُ أَنَا بَعْدُ فِي الْعَالَمِ وَأَمَّا هَؤُلاَءِ فَهُمْ فِي الْعَالَمِ وَأَنَا آتِي إِلَيْكَ. أَيُّهَا الآبُ الْقُدُّوسُ احْفَظْهُمْ فِي اسْمِكَ. الَّذِينَ أَعْطَيْتَنِي لِيَكُونُوا وَاحِداً كَمَا نَحْنُ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: While I was with them in the world, I kept them in Your name. Those whom You gave Me I have kept; and none of them is lost except the son of perdition, that the Scripture might be fulfilled.
cells.arabic: حِينَ كُنْتُ مَعَهُمْ فِي الْعَالَمِ كُنْتُ أَحْفَظُهُمْ فِي اسْمِكَ. الَّذِينَ أَعْطَيْتَنِي حَفِظْتُهُمْ وَلَمْ يَهْلِكْ مِنْهُمْ أَحَدٌ إِلاَّ ابْنُ الْهلاَكِ لِيَتِمَّ الْكِتَابُ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: But now I come to You, and these things I speak in the world, that they may have My joy fulfilled in themselves.
cells.arabic: أَمَّا الآنَ فَإِنِّي آتِي إِلَيْكَ. وَأَتَكَلَّمُ بِهَذَا فِي الْعَالَمِ لِيَكُونَ لَهُمْ فَرَحِي كَامِلاً فِيهِمْ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: I have given them Your word; and the world has hated them because they are not of the world, just as I am not of the world.
cells.arabic: أَنَا قَدْ أَعْطَيْتُهُمْ كلاَمَكَ وَالْعَالَمُ أَبْغَضَهُمْ لأَنَّهُمْ لَيْسُوا مِنَ الْعَالَمِ كَمَا أَنِّي أَنَا لَسْتُ مِنَ الْعَالَمِ

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: I do not pray that You should take them out of the world, but that You should keep them from the evil one.
cells.arabic: لَسْتُ أَسْأَلُ أَنْ تَأْخُذَهُمْ مِنَ الْعَالَمِ بَلْ أَنْ تَحْفَظَهُمْ مِنَ الشِّرِّيرِ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: They are not of the world, just as I am not of the world.
cells.arabic: لَيْسُوا مِنَ الْعَالَمِ كَمَا أَنِّي أَنَا لَسْتُ مِنَ الْعَالَمِ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Sanctify them by Your truth. Your word is truth.
cells.arabic: قَدِّسْهُمْ فِي حَقِّكَ. كلاَمُكَ هُوَ حَقٌّ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: As You sent Me into the world, I also have sent them into the world.
cells.arabic: كَمَا أَرْسَلْتَنِي إِلَى الْعَالَمِ أَرْسَلْتُهُمْ أَنَا إِلَى الْعَالَمِ

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And for their sakes I sanctify Myself, that they also may be sanctified by the truth.
cells.arabic: وَلأَجْلِهِمْ أُقَدِّسُ أَنَا ذَاتِي لِيَكُونُوا هُمْ أَيْضاً مُقَدَّسِينَ فِي الْحَقِّ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: “I do not pray for these alone, but also for those who will believe in Me through their word;
cells.arabic: «وَلَسْتُ أَسْأَلُ مِنْ أَجْلِ هَؤُلاَءِ فَقَطْ بَلْ أَيْضاً مِنْ أَجْلِ الَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِي بِكلاَمِهِمْ

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: that they all may be one, as You, Father, are in Me, and I in You; that they also may be one in Us, that the world may believe that You sent Me.
cells.arabic: لِيَكُونَ الْجَمِيعُ وَاحِداً كَمَا أَنَّكَ أَنْتَ أَيُّهَا الآبُ فِيَّ وَأَنَا فِيكَ لِيَكُونُوا هُمْ أَيْضاً وَاحِداً فِينَا لِيُؤْمِنَ الْعَالَمُ أَنَّكَ أَرْسَلْتَنِي.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And the glory which You gave Me I have given them, that they may be one just as We are one:
cells.arabic: وَأَنَا قَدْ أَعْطَيْتُهُمُ الْمَجْدَ الَّذِي أَعْطَيْتَنِي لِيَكُونُوا وَاحِداً كَمَا أَنَّنَا نَحْنُ وَاحِدٌ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: I in them, and You in Me; that they may be made perfect in one, and that the world may know that You have sent Me, and have loved them as You have loved Me.
cells.arabic: أَنَا فِيهِمْ وَأَنْتَ فِيَّ لِيَكُونُوا مُكَمَّلِينَ إِلَى وَاحِدٍ وَلِيَعْلَمَ الْعَالَمُ أَنَّكَ أَرْسَلْتَنِي وَأَحْبَبْتَهُمْ كَمَا أَحْبَبْتَنِي.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: “Father, I desire that they also whom You gave Me may be with Me where I am, that they may behold My glory which You have given Me; for You loved Me before the foundation of the world.
cells.arabic: أَيُّهَا الآبُ أُرِيدُ أَنَّ هَؤُلاَءِ الَّذِينَ أَعْطَيْتَنِي يَكُونُونَ مَعِي حَيْثُ أَكُونُ أَنَا لِيَنْظُرُوا مَجْدِي الَّذِي أَعْطَيْتَنِي لأَنَّكَ أَحْبَبْتَنِي قَبْلَ إِنْشَاءِ الْعَالَمِ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: O righteous Father! The world has not known You, but I have known You; and these have known that You sent Me.
cells.arabic: أَيُّهَا الآبُ الْبَارُّ إِنَّ الْعَالَمَ لَمْ يَعْرِفْكَ أَمَّا أَنَا فَعَرَفْتُكَ وَهَؤُلاَءِ عَرَفُوا أَنَّكَ أَنْتَ أَرْسَلْتَنِي.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And I have declared to them Your name, and will declare it, that the love with which You loved Me may be in them, and I in them.”
cells.arabic: وَعَرَّفْتُهُمُ اسْمَكَ وَسَأُعَرِّفُهُمْ لِيَكُونَ فِيهِمُ الْحُبُّ الَّذِي أَحْبَبْتَنِي بِهِ وَأَكُونَ أَنَا فِيهِمْ».

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Now as they said these things, Jesus Himself stood in the midst of them, and said to them, “Peace to you.”
cells.arabic: وَفِيمَا هُمْ يَتَكَلَّمُونَ بِهَذَا وَقَفَ يَسُوعُ نَفْسُهُ فِي وَسَطِهِمْ وَقَالَ لَهُمْ: «سَلاَمٌ لَكُمْ!»

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: But they were terrified and frightened, and supposed they had seen a spirit.
cells.arabic: فَجَزِعُوا وَخَافُوا وَظَنُّوا أَنَّهُمْ نَظَرُوا رُوحاً.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And He said to them, “Why are you troubled? And why do doubts arise in your hearts?
cells.arabic: فَقَالَ لَهُمْ: «مَا بَالُكُمْ مُضْطَرِبِينَ وَلِمَاذَا تَخْطُرُ أَفْكَارٌ فِي قُلُوبِكُمْ؟

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Behold My hands and My feet, that it is I Myself. Handle Me and see, for a spirit does not have flesh and bones as you see I have.”
cells.arabic: اُنْظُرُوا يَدَيَّ وَرِجْلَيَّ: إِنِّي أَنَا هُوَ. جُسُّونِي وَانْظُرُوا فَإِنَّ الرُّوحَ لَيْسَ لَهُ لَحْمٌ وَعِظَامٌ كَمَا تَرَوْنَ لِي».

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: When He had said this, He showed them His hands and His feet.
cells.arabic: وَحِينَ قَالَ هَذَا أَرَاهُمْ يَدَيْهِ وَرِجْلَيْهِ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: But while they still did not believe for joy, and marveled, He said to them, “Have you any food here?”
cells.arabic: وَبَيْنَمَا هُمْ غَيْرُ مُصَدِّقِين مِنَ الْفَرَحِ وَمُتَعَجِّبُونَ قَالَ لَهُمْ: «أَعِنْدَكُمْ هَهُنَا طَعَامٌ؟»

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: So they gave Him a piece of a broiled fish and some honeycomb.
cells.arabic: فَنَاوَلُوهُ جُزْءاً مِنْ سَمَكٍ مَشْوِيٍّ وَشَيْئاً مِنْ شَهْدِ عَسَلٍ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And He took it and ate in their presence.
cells.arabic: فَأَخَذَ وَأَكَلَ قُدَّامَهُمْ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then He said to them, “These are the words which I spoke to you while I was still with you, that all things must be fulfilled which were written in the Law of Moses and the Prophets and the Psalms concerning Me.”
cells.arabic: وَقَالَ لَهُمْ: «هَذَا هُوَ الْكَلاَمُ الَّذِي كَلَّمْتُكُمْ بِهِ وَأَنَا بَعْدُ مَعَكُمْ أَنَّهُ لاَ بُدَّ أَنْ يَتِمَّ جَمِيعُ مَا هُوَ مَكْتُوبٌ عَنِّي فِي نَامُوسِ مُوسَى وَالأَنْبِيَاءِ وَالْمَزَامِيرِ».

cells.english: In these lay a great multitude of sick people, blind, lame, paralyzed, waiting for the moving of the water.
cells.arabic: فِي هَذِهِ كَانَ مُضْطَجِعاً جُمْهُورٌ كَثِيرٌ مِنْ مَرْضَى وَعُمْيٍ وَعُرْجٍ وَعُسْمٍ يَتَوَقَّعُونَ تَحْرِيكَ الْمَاءِ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: For an angel went down at a certain time into the pool and stirred up the water; then whoever stepped in first, after the stirring of the water, was made well of whatever disease he had.
cells.arabic: لأَنَّ ملاَكاً كَانَ يَنْزِلُ أَحْيَاناً فِي الْبِرْكَةِ وَيُحَرِّكُ الْمَاءَ. فَمَنْ نَزَلَ أَوَّلاً بَعْدَ تَحْرِيكِ الْمَاءِ كَانَ يَبْرَأُ مِنْ أَيِّ مَرَضٍ اعْتَرَاهُ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Now a certain man was there who had an infirmity thirty-eight years.
cells.arabic: وَكَانَ هُنَاكَ إِنْسَانٌ بِهِ مَرَضٌ مُنْذُ ثَمَانٍ وَثلاَثِينَ سَنَةً.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: When Jesus saw him lying there, and knew that he already had been in that condition a long time, He said to him, “Do you want to be made well?”
cells.arabic: هَذَا رَآهُ يَسُوعُ مُضْطَجِعاً وَعَلِمَ أَنَّ لَهُ زَمَاناً كَثِيراً فَقَالَ لَهُ: «أَتُرِيدُ أَنْ تَبْرَأَ؟»

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: The sick man answered Him, “Sir, I have no man to put me into the pool when the water is stirred up; but while I am coming, another steps down before me.”
cells.arabic: أَجَابَهُ الْمَرِيضُ: «يَا سَيِّدُ لَيْسَ لِي إِنْسَانٌ يُلْقِينِي فِي الْبِرْكَةِ مَتَى تَحَرَّكَ الْمَاءُ. بَلْ بَيْنَمَا أَنَا آتٍ يَنْزِلُ قُدَّامِي آخَرُ».

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Jesus said to him, “Rise, take up your bed and walk.”
cells.arabic: قَالَ لَهُ يَسُوعُ: «قُمِ. احْمِلْ سَرِيرَكَ وَامْشِ».

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And immediately the man was made well, took up his bed, and walked. And that day was the Sabbath.
cells.arabic: فَحَالاً بَرِئَ الإِنْسَانُ وَحَمَلَ سَرِيرَهُ وَمَشَى. وَكَانَ فِي ذَلِكَ الْيَوْمِ سَبْتٌ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: The Jews therefore said to him who was cured, “It is the Sabbath; it is not lawful for you to carry your bed.”
cells.arabic: فَقَالَ الْيَهُودُ لِلَّذِي شُفِيَ: «إِنَّهُ سَبْتٌ! لاَ يَحِلُّ لَكَ أَنْ تَحْمِلَ سَرِيرَكَ».

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: He answered them, “He who made me well said to me, ‘Take up your bed and walk.’”
cells.arabic: أَجَابَهُمْ: «إِنَّ الَّذِي أَبْرَأَنِي هُوَ قَالَ لِي احْمِلْ سَرِيرَكَ وَامْشِ».

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then they asked him, “Who is the Man who said to you, ‘Take up your bed and walk’?”
cells.arabic: فَسَأَلُوهُ: «مَنْ هُوَ الإِنْسَانُ الَّذِي قَالَ لَكَ احْمِلْ سَرِيرَكَ وَامْشِ؟».

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: But the one who was healed did not know who it was, for Jesus had withdrawn, a multitude being in that place.
cells.arabic: أَمَّا الَّذِي شُفِيَ فَلَمْ يَكُنْ يَعْلَمُ مَنْ هُوَ لأَنَّ يَسُوعَ اعْتَزَلَ إِذْ كَانَ فِي الْمَوْضِعِ جَمْعٌ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Afterward Jesus found him in the temple, and said to him, “See, you have been made well. Sin no more, lest a worse thing come upon you.”
cells.arabic: بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ وَجَدَهُ يَسُوعُ فِي الْهَيْكَلِ وَقَالَ لَهُ: «هَا أَنْتَ قَدْ بَرِئْتَ فلاَ تُخْطِئْ أَيْضاً لِئَلَّا يَكُونَ لَكَ أَشَرُّ».

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: The man departed and told the Jews that it was Jesus who had made him well.
cells.arabic: فَمَضَى الإِنْسَانُ وَأَخْبَرَ الْيَهُودَ أَنَّ يَسُوعَ هُوَ الَّذِي أَبْرَأَهُ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: For this reason the Jews persecuted Jesus, and sought to kill Him, because He had done these things on the Sabbath.
cells.arabic: وَلِهَذَا كَانَ الْيَهُودُ يَطْرُدُونَ يَسُوعَ وَيَطْلُبُونَ أَنْ يَقْتُلُوهُ لأَنَّهُ عَمِلَ هَذَا فِي سَبْتٍ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: But Jesus answered them, “My Father has been working until now, and I have been working.”
cells.arabic: فَأَجَابَهُمْ يَسُوعُ: «أَبِي يَعْمَلُ حَتَّى الآنَ وَأَنَا أَعْمَلُ».

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then Jesus entered and passed through Jericho.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ دَخَلَ وَاجْتَازَ فِي أَرِيحَا.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Now behold, there was a man named Zacchaeus who was a chief tax collector, and he was rich.
cells.arabic: وَإِذَا رَجُلٌ اسْمُهُ زَكَّا وَهُوَ رَئِيسٌ لِلْعَشَّارِينَ وَكَانَ غَنِيّاً

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And he sought to see who Jesus was, but could not because of the crowd, for he was of short stature.
cells.arabic: وَطَلَبَ أَنْ يَرَى يَسُوعَ مَنْ هُوَ وَلَمْ يَقْدِرْ مِنَ الْجَمْعِ لأَنَّهُ كَانَ قَصِيرَ الْقَامَةِ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: So he ran ahead and climbed up into a sycamore tree to see Him, for He was going to pass that way.
cells.arabic: فَرَكَضَ مُتَقَدِّماً وَصَعِدَ إِلَى جُمَّيْزَةٍ لِكَيْ يَرَاهُ لأَنَّهُ كَانَ مُزْمِعاً أَنْ يَمُرَّ مِنْ هُنَاكَ.

seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And when Jesus came to the place, He looked up and saw him, and said to him, “Zacchaeus, make haste and come down, for today I must stay at your house.”
cells.arabic: فَلَمَّا جَاءَ يَسُوعُ إِلَى الْمَكَانِ نَظَرَ إِلَى فَوْقُ فَرَآهُ وَقَالَ لَهُ: «يَا زَكَّا أَسْرِعْ وَانْزِلْ لأَنَّهُ يَنْبَغِي أَنْ أَمْكُثَ الْيَوْمَ فِي بَيْتِكَ».

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: So he made haste and came down, and received Him joyfully.
cells.arabic: فَأَسْرَعَ وَنَزَلَ وَقَبِلَهُ فَرِحاً.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: But when they saw it, they all complained, saying, “He has gone to be a guest with a man who is a sinner.”
cells.arabic: فَلَمَّا رَأَى الْجَمِيعُ ذَلِكَ تَذَمَّرُوا قَائِلِينَ: «إِنَّهُ دَخَلَ لِيَبِيتَ عِنْدَ رَجُلٍ خَاطِئٍ».

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then Zacchaeus stood and said to the Lord, “Look, Lord, I give half of my goods to the poor; and if I have taken anything from anyone by false accusation, I restore fourfold.”
cells.arabic: فَوَقَفَ زَكَّا وَقَالَ لِلرَّبِّ: «هَا أَنَا يَا رَبُّ أُعْطِي نِصْفَ أَمْوَالِي لِلْمَسَاكِينِ وَإِنْ كُنْتُ قَدْ وَشَيْتُ بِأَحَدٍ أَرُدُّ أَرْبَعَةَ أَضْعَافٍ».

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And Jesus said to him, “Today salvation has come to this house, because he also is a son of Abraham;
cells.arabic: فَقَالَ لَهُ يَسُوعُ: «الْيَوْمَ حَصَلَ خَلاَصٌ لِهَذَا الْبَيْتِ إِذْ هُوَ أَيْضاً ابْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: for the Son of Man has come to seek and to save that which was lost.”
cells.arabic: لأَنَّ ابْنَ الإِنْسَانِ قَدْ جَاءَ لِكَيْ يَطْلُبَ وَيُخَلِّصَ مَا قَدْ هَلَكَ».

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And when He had called His twelve disciples to Him, He gave them power over unclean spirits, to cast them out, and to heal all kinds of sickness and all kinds of disease.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ دَعَا تَلاَمِيذَهُ الاِثْنَيْ عَشَرَ وَأَعْطَاهُمْ سُلْطَاناً عَلَى أَرْوَاحٍ نَجِسَةٍ حَتَّى يُخْرِجُوهَا وَيَشْفُوا كُلَّ مَرَضٍ وَكُلَّ ضُعْفٍ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Now the names of the twelve apostles are these: first, Simon, who is called Peter, and Andrew his brother; James the son of Zebedee, and John his brother;
cells.arabic: وَأَمَّا أَسْمَاءُ الاِثْنَيْ عَشَرَ رَسُولاً فَهِيَ هَذِهِ: الأَََوَّلُ سِمْعَانُ الَّذِي يُقَالُ لَهُ بُطْرُسُ وَأَنْدَرَاوُسُ أَخُوهُ. يَعْقُوبُ بْنُ زَبْدِي وَيُوحَنَّا أَخُوهُ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Philip and Bartholomew; Thomas and Matthew the tax collector; James the son of Alphaeus, and Lebbaeus, whose surname was Thaddaeus;
cells.arabic: فِيلُبُّسُ وَبَرْثُولَمَاوُسُ. تُومَا وَمَتَّى الْعَشَّارُ. يَعْقُوبُ بْنُ حَلْفَى وَلَبَّاوُسُ الْمُلَقَّبُ تَدَّاوُسَ.

seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Simon the Cananite, and Judas Iscariot, who also betrayed Him.
cells.arabic: سِمْعَانُ الْقَانَوِيُّ وَيَهُوذَا الإِسْخَرْيُوطِيُّ الَّذِي أَسْلَمَهُ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: These twelve Jesus sent out and commanded them, saying: “Do not go into the way of the Gentiles, and do not enter a city of the Samaritans.
cells.arabic: هَؤُلاَءِ الاِثْنَا عَشَرَ أَرْسَلَهُمْ يَسُوعُ وَأَوْصَاهُمْ قَائِلاً: «إِلَى طَرِيقِ أُمَمٍ لاَ تَمْضُوا وَإِلَى مَدِينَةٍ لِلسَّامِرِيِّينَ لاَ تَدْخُلُوا.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: But go rather to the lost sheep of the house of Israel.
cells.arabic: بَلِ اذْهَبُوا بِالْحَرِيِّ إِلَى خِرَافِ بَيْتِ إِسْرَائِيلَ الضَّالَّةِ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And as you go, preach, saying, ‘The kingdom of heaven is at hand.’
cells.arabic: وَفِيمَا أَنْتُمْ ذَاهِبُونَ اكْرِزُوا قَائِلِينَ: إِنَّهُ قَدِ اقْتَرَبَ مَلَكُوتُ السَّمَاوَاتِ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Heal the sick, cleanse the lepers, raise the dead, cast out demons. Freely you have received, freely give.
cells.arabic: اشْفُوا مَرْضَى. طَهِّرُوا بُرْصاً. أَقِيمُوا مَوْتَى. أَخْرِجُوا شَيَاطِينَ. مَجَّاناً أَخَذْتُمْ مَجَّاناً أَعْطُوا.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: After these things the Lord appointed seventy others also, and sent them two by two before His face into every city and place where He Himself was about to go.
cells.arabic: وَبَعْدَ ذَلِكَ عَيَّنَ الرَّبُّ سَبْعِينَ آخَرِينَ أَيْضاً وَأَرْسَلَهُمُ اثْنَيْنِ اثْنَيْنِ أَمَامَ وَجْهِهِ إِلَى كُلِّ مَدِينَةٍ وَمَوْضِعٍ حَيْثُ كَانَ هُوَ مُزْمِعاً أَنْ يَأْتِيَ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then He said to them, “The harvest truly is great, but the laborers are few; therefore pray the Lord of the harvest to send out laborers into His harvest.
cells.arabic: فَقَالَ لَهُمْ: «إِنَّ الْحَصَادَ كَثِيرٌ وَلَكِنَّ الْفَعَلَةَ قَلِيلُونَ. فَاطْلُبُوا مِنْ رَبِّ الْحَصَادِ أَنْ يُرْسِلَ فَعَلَةً إِلَى حَصَادِهِ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Go your way; behold, I send you out as lambs among wolves.
cells.arabic: اِذْهَبُوا. هَا أَنَا أُرْسِلُكُمْ مِثْلَ حُمْلاَنٍ بَيْنَ ذِئَابٍ.

cells.english: Carry neither money bag, knapsack, nor sandals; and greet no one along the road.
cells.arabic: لاَ تَحْمِلُوا كِيساً وَلاَ مِزْوَداً وَلاَ أَحْذِيَةً وَلاَ تُسَلِّمُوا عَلَى أَحَدٍ فِي الطَّرِيقِ.

cells.english: But whatever house you enter, first say, ‘Peace to this house.’
cells.arabic: وَأَيُّ بَيْتٍ دَخَلْتُمُوهُ فَقُولُوا أَوَّلاً: سَلاَمٌ لِهَذَا الْبَيْتِ.

cells.english: And if a son of peace is there, your peace will rest on it; if not, it will return to you.
cells.arabic: فَإِنْ كَانَ هُنَاكَ ابْنُ السَّلاَمِ يَحِلُّ سَلاَمُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ وَإِلاَّ فَيَرْجِعُ إِلَيْكُمْ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed

cells.english: And remain in the same house, eating and drinking such things as they give, for the laborer is worthy of his wages. Do not go from house to house.
cells.arabic: وَأَقِيمُوا فِي ذَلِكَ الْبَيْتِ آكِلِينَ وَشَارِبِينَ مِمَّا عِنْدَهُمْ لأَنَّ الْفَاعِلَ مُسْتَحِقٌّ أُجْرَتَهُ. لاَ تَنْتَقِلُوا مِنْ بَيْتٍ إِلَى بَيْتٍ.

cells.english: Whatever city you enter, and they receive you, eat such things as are set before you.
cells.arabic: وَأَيَّةُ مَدِينَةٍ دَخَلْتُمُوهَا وَقَبِلُوكُمْ فَكُلُوا مِمَّا يُقَدَّمُ لَكُمْ

cells.english: And heal the sick there, and say to them, ‘The kingdom of God has come near to you.’
cells.arabic: وَاشْفُوا الْمَرْضَى الَّذِينَ فِيهَا وَقُولُوا لَهُمْ: قَدِ اقْتَرَبَ مِنْكُمْ مَلَكُوتُ اللهِ

cells.english: “Let not your heart be troubled; you believe in God, believe also in Me.
cells.arabic: «لاَ تَضْطَرِبْ قُلُوبُكُمْ. أَنْتُمْ تُؤْمِنُونَ بِاللَّهِ فَآمِنُوا بِي.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: In My Father’s house are many mansions; if it were not so, I would have told you. I go to prepare a place for you.
cells.arabic: فِي بَيْتِ أَبِي مَنَازِلُ كَثِيرَةٌ وَإِلاَّ فَإِنِّي كُنْتُ قَدْ قُلْتُ لَكُمْ. أَنَا أَمْضِي لِأُعِدَّ لَكُمْ مَكَاناً

seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And if I go and prepare a place for you, I will come again and receive you to Myself; that where I am, there you may be also.
cells.arabic: وَإِنْ مَضَيْتُ وَأَعْدَدْتُ لَكُمْ مَكَاناً آتِي أَيْضاً وَآخُذُكُمْ إِلَيَّ حَتَّى حَيْثُ أَكُونُ أَنَا تَكُونُونَ أَنْتُمْ أَيْضاً

cells.english: And where I go you know, and the way you know.”
cells.arabic: وَتَعْلَمُونَ حَيْثُ أَنَا أَذْهَبُ وَتَعْلَمُونَ الطَّرِيقَ».

seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Thomas said to Him, “Lord, we do not know where You are going, and how can we know the way?”
cells.arabic: قَالَ لَهُ تُومَا: «يَا سَيِّدُ لَسْنَا نَعْلَمُ أَيْنَ تَذْهَبُ فَكَيْفَ نَقْدِرُ أَنْ نَعْرِفَ الطَّرِيقَ؟»

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Jesus said to him, “I am the way, the truth, and the life. No one comes to the Father except through Me.
cells.arabic: قَالَ لَهُ يَسُوعُ: «أَنَا هُوَ الطَّرِيقُ وَالْحَقُّ وَالْحَيَاةُ. لَيْسَ أَحَدٌ يَأْتِي إِلَى الآبِ إِلاَّ بِي.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: “If you had known Me, you would have known My Father also; and from now on you know Him and have seen Him.”
cells.arabic: لَوْ كُنْتُمْ قَدْ عَرَفْتُمُونِي لَعَرَفْتُمْ أَبِي أَيْضاً. وَمِنَ الآنَ تَعْرِفُونَهُ وَقَدْ رَأَيْتُمُوهُ».

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Philip said to Him, “Lord, show us the Father, and it is sufficient for us.”
cells.arabic: قَالَ لَهُ فِيلُبُّسُ: «يَا سَيِّدُ أَرِنَا الآبَ وَكَفَانَا».

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Jesus said to him, “Have I been with you so long, and yet you have not known Me, Philip? He who has seen Me has seen the Father; so how can you say, ‘Show us the Father’?
cells.arabic: قَالَ لَهُ يَسُوعُ: «أَنَا مَعَكُمْ زَمَاناً هَذِهِ مُدَّتُهُ وَلَمْ تَعْرِفْنِي يَا فِيلُبُّسُ! اَلَّذِي رَآنِي فَقَدْ رَأَى الآبَ فَكَيْفَ تَقُولُ أَنْتَ أَرِنَا الآبَ؟

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Do you not believe that I am in the Father, and the Father in Me? The words that I speak to you I do not speak on My own authority; but the Father who dwells in Me does the works.
cells.arabic: أَلَسْتَ تُؤْمِنُ أَنِّي أَنَا فِي الآبِ وَالآبَ فِيَّ؟ الْكلاَمُ الَّذِي أُكَلِّمُكُمْ بِهِ لَسْتُ أَتَكَلَّمُ بِهِ مِنْ نَفْسِي لَكِنَّ الآبَ الْحَالَّ فِيَّ هُوَ يَعْمَلُ الأَعْمَالَ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Believe Me that I am in the Father and the Father in Me, or else believe Me for the sake of the works themselves.
cells.arabic: صَدِّقُونِي أَنِّي فِي الآبِ وَالآبَ فِيَّ وَإِلاَّ فَصَدِّقُونِي لِسَبَبِ الأَعْمَالِ نَفْسِهَا.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: “Most assuredly, I say to you, he who believes in Me, the works that I do he will do also; and greater works than these he will do, because I go to My Father.
cells.arabic: اَلْحَقَّ الْحَقَّ أَقُولُ لَكُمْ: مَنْ يُؤْمِنُ بِي فَالأَعْمَالُ الَّتِي أَنَا أَعْمَلُهَا يَعْمَلُهَا هُوَ أَيْضاً وَيَعْمَلُ أَعْظَمَ مِنْهَا لأَنِّي مَاضٍ إِلَى أَبِي.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And whatever you ask in My name, that I will do, that the Father may be glorified in the Son.
cells.arabic: وَمَهْمَا سَأَلْتُمْ بِاسْمِي فَذَلِكَ أَفْعَلُهُ لِيَتَمَجَّدَ الآبُ بِالاِبْنِ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: If you ask anything in My name, I will do it.
cells.arabic: إِنْ سَأَلْتُمْ شَيْئاً بِاسْمِي فَإِنِّي أَفْعَلُهُ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: “If you love Me, keep My commandments.
cells.arabic: «إِنْ كُنْتُمْ تُحِبُّونَنِي فَاحْفَظُوا وَصَايَايَ

cells.english: And I will pray the Father, and He will give you another Helper, that He may abide with you forever—
cells.arabic: وَأَنَا أَطْلُبُ مِنَ الآبِ فَيُعْطِيكُمْ مُعَزِّياً آخَرَ لِيَمْكُثَ مَعَكُمْ إِلَى الأَبَدِ

cells.english: the Spirit of truth, whom the world cannot receive, because it neither sees Him nor knows Him; but you know Him, for He dwells with you and will be in you.
cells.arabic: رُوحُ الْحَقِّ الَّذِي لاَ يَسْتَطِيعُ الْعَالَمُ أَنْ يَقْبَلَهُ لأَنَّهُ لاَ يَرَاهُ وَلاَ يَعْرِفُهُ وَأَمَّا أَنْتُمْ فَتَعْرِفُونَهُ لأَنَّهُ مَاكِثٌ مَعَكُمْ وَيَكُونُ فِيكُمْ.

cells.english: I will not leave you orphans; I will come to you.
cells.arabic: لاَ أَتْرُكُكُمْ يَتَامَى. إِنِّي آتِي إِلَيْكُمْ.

cells.english: “A little while longer and the world will see Me no more, but you will see Me. Because I live, you will live also.
cells.arabic: بَعْدَ قَلِيلٍ لاَ يَرَانِي الْعَالَمُ أَيْضاً وَأَمَّا أَنْتُمْ فَتَرَوْنَنِي. إِنِّي أَنَا حَيٌّ فَأَنْتُمْ سَتَحْيَوْنَ.

cells.english: Then one of the Pharisees asked Him to eat with him. And He went to the Pharisee’s house, and sat down to eat.
cells.arabic: وَسَأَلَهُ وَاحِدٌ مِنَ الْفَرِّيسِيِّينَ أَنْ يَأْكُلَ مَعَهُ فَدَخَلَ بَيْتَ الْفَرِّيسِيِّ وَاتَّكَأَ.

cells.english: And behold, a woman in the city who was a sinner, when she knew that Jesus sat at the table in the Pharisee’s house, brought an alabaster flask of fragrant oil,
cells.arabic: وَإِذَا امْرَأَةٌ فِي الْمَدِينَةِ كَانَتْ خَاطِئَةً إِذْ عَلِمَتْ أَنَّهُ مُتَّكِئٌ فِي بَيْتِ الْفَرِّيسِيِّ جَاءَتْ بِقَارُورَةِ طِيبٍ

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: and stood at His feet behind Him weeping; and she began to wash His feet with her tears, and wiped them with the hair of her head; and she kissed His feet and anointed them with the fragrant oil.
cells.arabic: وَوَقَفَتْ عِنْدَ قَدَمَيْهِ مِنْ وَرَائِهِ بَاكِيَةً وَابْتَدَأَتْ تَبُلُّ قَدَمَيْهِ بِالدُّمُوعِ وَكَانَتْ تَمْسَحُهُمَا بِشَعْرِ رَأْسِهَا وَتُقَبِّلُ قَدَمَيْهِ وَتَدْهَنُهُمَا بِالطِّيبِ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Now when the Pharisee who had invited Him saw this, he spoke to himself, saying, “This Man, if He were a prophet, would know who and what manner of woman this is who is touching Him, for she is a sinner.”
cells.arabic: فَلَمَّا رَأَى الْفَرِّيسِيُّ الَّذِي دَعَاهُ ذَلِكَ قَالَ فِي نَفْسِهِ: «لَوْ كَانَ هَذَا نَبِيّاً لَعَلِمَ مَنْ هَذِهِ الْمَرْأَةُ الَّتِي تَلْمِسُهُ وَمَا هِيَ! إِنَّهَا خَاطِئِةٌ».

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And Jesus answered and said to him, “Simon, I have something to say to you.” So he said, “Teacher, say it.”
cells.arabic: فَقَالَ يَسُوعُ: «يَا سِمْعَانُ عِنْدِي شَيْءٌ أَقُولُهُ لَكَ». فَقَالَ: «قُلْ يَا مُعَلِّمُ».

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: “There was a certain creditor who had two debtors. One owed five hundred denarii, and the other fifty.
cells.arabic: «كَانَ لِمُدَايِنٍ مَدْيُونَانِ. عَلَى الْوَاحِدِ خَمْسُ مِئَةِ دِينَارٍ وَعَلَى الآخَرِ خَمْسُونَ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And when they had nothing with which to repay, he freely forgave them both. Tell Me, therefore, which of them will love him more?”
cells.arabic: وَإِذْ لَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُمَا مَا يُوفِيَانِ سَامَحَهُمَا جَمِيعاً. فَقُلْ: أَيُّهُمَا يَكُونُ أَكْثَرَ حُبّاً لَهُ؟»

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Simon answered and said, “I suppose the one whom he forgave more.” And He said to him, “You have rightly judged.”
cells.arabic: فَأَجَابَ سِمْعَانُ: «أَظُنُّ الَّذِي سَامَحَهُ بِالأَكْثَرِ». فَقَالَ لَهُ: «بِالصَّوَابِ حَكَمْتَ».

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then He turned to the woman and said to Simon, “Do you see this woman? I entered your house; you gave Me no water for My feet, but she has washed My feet with her tears and wiped them with the hair of her head.
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ الْتَفَتَ إِلَى الْمَرْأَةِ وَقَالَ لِسِمْعَانَ: «أَتَنْظُرُ هَذِهِ الْمَرْأَةَ؟ إِنِّي دَخَلْتُ بَيْتَكَ وَمَاءً لأَجْلِ رِجْلَيَّ لَمْ تُعْطِ. وَأَمَّا هِيَ فَقَدْ غَسَلَتْ رِجْلَيَّ بِالدُّمُوعِ وَمَسَحَتْهُمَا بِشَعْرِ رَأْسِهَا.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: You gave Me no kiss, but this woman has not ceased to kiss My feet since the time I came in.
cells.arabic: قُبْلَةً لَمْ تُقَبِّلْنِي وَأَمَّا هِيَ فَمُنْذُ دَخَلْتُ لَمْ تَكُفَّ عَنْ تَقْبِيلِ رِجْلَيَّ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: You did not anoint My head with oil, but this woman has anointed My feet with fragrant oil.
cells.arabic: بِزَيْتٍ لَمْ تَدْهُنْ رَأْسِي وَأَمَّا هِيَ فَقَدْ دَهَنَتْ بِالطِّيبِ رِجْلَيَّ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Therefore I say to you, her sins, which are many, are forgiven, for she loved much. But to whom little is forgiven, the same loves little.”
cells.arabic: مِنْ أَجْلِ ذَلِكَ أَقُولُ لَكَ: قَدْ غُفِرَتْ خَطَايَاهَا الْكَثِيرَةُ لأَنَّهَا أَحَبَّتْ كَثِيراً. وَالَّذِي يُغْفَرُ لَهُ قَلِيلٌ يُحِبُّ قَلِيلاً».

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then He said to her, “Your sins are forgiven.”
cells.arabic: ثُمَّ قَالَ لَهَا: «مَغْفُورَةٌ لَكِ خَطَايَاكِ».

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And those who sat at the table with Him began to say to themselves, “Who is this who even forgives sins?”
cells.arabic: فَابْتَدَأَ الْمُتَّكِئُونَ مَعَهُ يَقُولُونَ فِي أَنْفُسِهِمْ: «مَنْ هَذَا الَّذِي يَغْفِرُ خَطَايَا أَيْضاً؟».

seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Then He said to the woman, “Your faith has saved you. Go in peace.”
cells.arabic: فَقَالَ لِلْمَرْأَةِ: «إِيمَانُكِ قَدْ خَلَّصَكِ! اِذْهَبِي بِسَلاَمٍ».

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: “For if you forgive men their trespasses, your heavenly Father will also forgive you.
cells.arabic: فَإِنَّهُ إِنْ غَفَرْتُمْ لِلنَّاسِ زَلَّاتِهِمْ يَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ أَيْضاً أَبُوكُمُ السَّمَاوِيُّ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: But if you do not forgive men their trespasses, neither will your Father forgive your trespasses.
cells.arabic: وَإِنْ لَمْ تَغْفِرُوا لِلنَّاسِ زَلَّاتِهِمْ لاَ يَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ أَبُوكُمْ أَيْضاً زَلَّاتِكُمْ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: “Moreover, when you fast, do not be like the hypocrites, with a sad countenance. For they disfigure their faces that they may appear to men to be fasting. Assuredly, I say to you, they have their reward.
cells.arabic: «وَمَتَى صُمْتُمْ فَلاَ تَكُونُوا عَابِسِينَ كَالْمُرَائِينَ فَإِنَّهُمْ يُغَيِّرُونَ وُجُوهَهُمْ لِكَيْ يَظْهَرُوا لِلنَّاسِ صَائِمِينَ. اَلْحَقَّ أَقُولُ لَكُمْ: إِنَّهُمْ قَدِ اسْتَوْفَوْا أَجْرَهُمْ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: But you, when you fast, anoint your head and wash your face,
cells.arabic: وَأَمَّا أَنْتَ فَمَتَى صُمْتَ فَادْهُنْ رَأْسَكَ وَاغْسِلْ وَجْهَكَ

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: so that you do not appear to men to be fasting, but to your Father who is in the secret place; and your Father who sees in secret will reward you openly.
cells.arabic: لِكَيْ لاَ تَظْهَرَ لِلنَّاسِ صَائِماً بَلْ لأَبِيكَ الَّذِي فِي الْخَفَاءِ. فَأَبُوكَ الَّذِي يَرَى فِي الْخَفَاءِ يُجَازِيكَ عَلاَنِيَةً.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: When Jesus came into the region of Caesarea Philippi, He asked His disciples, saying, “Who do men say that I, the Son of Man, am?”
cells.arabic: وَلَمَّا جَاءَ يَسُوعُ إِلَى نَوَاحِي قَيْصَرِيَّةِ فِيلُبُّسَ سَأَلَ تَلاَمِيذَهُ: «مَنْ يَقُولُ النَّاسُ إِنِّي أَنَا ابْنُ الإِنْسَانِ؟»

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: So they said, “Some say John the Baptist, some Elijah, and others Jeremiah or one of the prophets.”
cells.arabic: فَقَالُوا: «قَوْمٌ يُوحَنَّا الْمَعْمَدَانُ وَآخَرُونَ إِيلِيَّا وَآخَرُونَ إِرْمِيَا أَوْ وَاحِدٌ مِنَ الأَنْبِيَاءِ».

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: He said to them, “But who do you say that I am?”
cells.arabic: قَالَ لَهُمْ: «وَأَنْتُمْ مَنْ تَقُولُونَ إِنِّي أَنَا؟»

seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Simon Peter answered and said, “You are the Christ, the Son of the living God.”
cells.arabic: فَأَجَابَ سِمْعَانُ بُطْرُسُ: «أَنْتَ هُوَ الْمَسِيحُ ابْنُ اللَّهِ الْحَيِّ».

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Jesus answered and said to him, “Blessed are you, Simon Bar-Jonah, for flesh and blood has not revealed this to you, but My Father who is in heaven.
cells.arabic: فَقَالَ لَهُ يَسُوعُ: «طُوبَى لَكَ يَا سِمْعَانُ بْنَ يُونَا إِنَّ لَحْماً وَدَماً لَمْ يُعْلِنْ لَكَ لَكِنَّ أَبِي الَّذِي فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And I also say to you that you are Peter, and on this rock I will build My church, and the gates of Hades shall not prevail against it.
cells.arabic: وَأَنَا أَقُولُ لَكَ أَيْضاً: أَنْتَ بُطْرُسُ وَعَلَى هَذِهِ الصَّخْرَةِ أَبْنِي كَنِيسَتِي وَأَبْوَابُ الْجَحِيمِ لَنْ تَقْوَى عَلَيْهَا.

seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: And I will give you the keys of the kingdom of heaven, and whatever you bind on earth will be bound in heaven, and whatever you loose on earth will be loosed in heaven.”
cells.arabic: وَأُعْطِيكَ مَفَاتِيحَ مَلَكُوتِ السَّمَاوَاتِ فَكُلُّ مَا تَرْبِطُهُ عَلَى الأَرْضِ يَكُونُ مَرْبُوطاً فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ. وَكُلُّ مَا تَحُلُّهُ عَلَى الأَرْضِ يَكُونُ مَحْلُولاً فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ».

cells.english: Glory be to God forever.
cells.coptic: Ⲇⲟⲝⲁ ⲥⲓ Ⲕⲩⲣⲓⲉ.
cells.arabic: والمجْدُ للهِ دَائماً.

english_title: Watos Exposition For the Feast of the Pentecost
title: Watos Exposition For the Feast of the Pentecost
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: The twelve Apostles were in Jerusalem, awaiting the Power which the Lord would send to them. When the fifty days were completed, the Holy Spirit, the Comforter descended upon the Apostles, and they spoke in the language of the heavenlies and the melody of the Angels. They were professing Christ and His glorious Resurrection.
cells.arabic: الإثنى عشر رسولاً كانوا في أورشليم ينتظرون القوة التي يرسلها الرب لهم. فلما كَمُلَت أيام الخمسين حلَّ الروح الباراقليط على الرسل وتكلموا بلغة السمائيين ونغمة الملائكة. واعترفوا بالمسيح وبمجد قيامته.

cells.english: When the Pentecost feast was completed, the Comforting Spirit, the Spirit of truth proceeding from the Father, descended upon the Apostles. They performed great miracles and had power among the peoples, bearing witness to the greatness of the proof of the Lord's Resurrection: He has risen from the dead.
cells.arabic: وكان لما كَمُلَ عيد البينطيقسطي، الروح المعزي، روح الحق المنبثق من الآب حلَّ على الرسل فكانوا يصنعون آياتاً عظيمة وقواتاً في الشعوب وكانوا يشهدون بعظم دالة عن قيامة الرب: إنه قام من الأموات.

cells.english: So, let us chant with David the Prophet against our enemies, saying: "They have bowed down and fallen; But we have risen and stand upright. When the Spirit shone like a fiery tongues, we prostrated on the ground, unable to bear its sight. We confess that it is by the coming of the Holy Spirit that we have learned to worship the Holy Trinity. We have learned that God is Spirit, and those who worship Him must worship in spirit and truth." Therefore, we ask and cry out, saying: "O Spirit, the Paraclete, kindle our minds and hearts, that we may speak as befits God."
cells.arabic: فلنرتل مع داود النبي مقابل أعدائنا قائلين: ”هم عثروا وسقطوا، ونحن نهضنا وقمنا. عندما أشرق الروح كألسنة نارية، نجثوا على الأرض، ولا نستطيع أن نحتمل منظره، ونحن معترفين أنه من قِبَل حلول الروح القدس تعلمنا السجود للثالوث المُحيّ. عَلِمنا أن الله روح، والذين يسجدون له ينبغي أن يسجدوا له بالروح والحق.“ من أجل هذا نسأل ونصرخ قائلين: ”أيها الروح البارقليط إلهب عقولنا وقلوبنا لنقول كما يليق بالله.“

cells.english: Glory to the Father, and to the Son, and to the Holy Spirit. The Holy Trinity, one in essence. Now and ever and unto the ages of the ages. Amen.
cells.arabic: المجد للآب والإبن والروح القدس. الثالوث المقدس المساوي. الآن وكل آوان وإلى دهر الداهرين آمين.

title: Interpretation – John 13:1-17
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: When the Jews were held captive in Egypt, God ordered them to slaughter the Paschal lamb in the evening and eat it roasted in fire.
cells.arabic: لما كانوا بنو إسرائيل بأرض مصر في ذل العبودية، أمرهم الله أن يذبحوا خروف الفصح مساءً ويأكلوه مشوياً بالنار.

cells.english: They call this feast ‘Pesach,’ i.e. Passover. This was a symbol to the shedding of Christ’s blood, the true Passover lamb, whose blood carried us from damnation to righteousness, from sin to virtue, from idolatry to the true God, and from hell to heaven.
cells.arabic: ويسمون ذلك عيد الفصح الذي معناه العبور. وكان ذلك إشارة إلى هرق دم المسيح حمل الله الفصح الحقيقي، الذي بهرق دمه نقلنا من الضلالة إلى الهدى، ومن الخطيئة إلى البر، ومن عبادة الأصنام إلى الإله الحق، ومن الجحيم إلى النعيم.

cells.english: When the Lord came to the upper room and ate the Passover Supper with His disciples, He “rose from supper and laid aside His garments, took a towel and girded Himself. After that, He poured water into a basin and began to wash the disciples’ feet, and to wipe them with the towel with which He was girded.”
cells.arabic: ولما حضر سيدنا إلى علية صهيون وأكل الفصح مع تلاميذه "قام عن العشاء وخلع ثيابه وأخذ منشقة وأتزر بها، ثم صب ماء في مغسل وابتدأ بغسل أرجل تلاميذه ويمسحها بالمنشفة التي كان متزراً بها".

cells.english: When Peter objected, God clarified the mystery saying, “Jesus answered and said to him, "What I am doing you do not understand now, but you will know after this."
cells.arabic: ولما امتنع بطرس أوضح له السر بقوله: "لست تعلم أنت الآن ما أنا أصنع ولكنك ستفهم فيما بعد"

cells.english: When the Lord wanted to give them His body and blood, He ordered them to reveal the dirt in their feet so that He may wash it away, to teach us that those who want to partake of His Holy body and blood must show their dirt to the priest first so that the priest may wash it away through repentance before they can partake of the Holy Communion.
cells.arabic: لأنه لما رام أن يعطيهم جسده ودمه أمرهم أن يكشفوا عن وسخ أرجلهم لكي يغسلها منه. ويعلمنا بذلك أن كل من يروم التناول من جسد الرب ودمه أن يكشف وسخ نفسه للكاهن لكي يغسلها منه بقانون التوبة قبل أن يتناول الجسد المحيي.

cells.english: ‘Jesus answered him, "If I do not wash you, you have no part with Me," means that those whom the priest does not wash their sins cannot have fellowship with Christ.
cells.arabic: وقوله لبطرس: "إن كنت لا أغسلك فليس لك معي نصيب" يعني أن كل من لا يغسل الكاهن وسخ الخطية الكائن فيه، فليس له مع المسيح نصيب.

cells.english: To avoid misperception that this has reference to baptism, the Lord washed only the body parts made dirty because of its closeness to the ground. Those who were baptized were purified, and no longer need to be fully washed before communion. They only need the washing of their feet.
cells.arabic: ولئلا يظن أحد أنه عن المعمودية يعني لم يغسل إلا الأعضاء التي بقربها من الأرض تتسخ لأن الذي استحم بالمعمودية وتظهر كله، لا يحتاج إلى الحميم بها ثانية قبل تناول القربان. بل يحتاج إلى غسل رجليه.

cells.english: In other words, before partaking communion, they must reveal to the priest the dirt which they collected through earthly sin, so that the priest may wash them with the sacrament of repentance,
cells.arabic: يعني قبل تناول القربان كل يوم يكشف للكاهن عن وسخه الذي قد توسخت منه أعضاؤه بالخطية الأرضية. لكن يغسله منها بقانون التوبة

cells.english: for those who are purified as such before communion, are made more pure and holy; while those who partake of the communion without repentance will be as doomed as Judas, for once he had taken communion, the devil came in him.
cells.arabic: لأن الذي يتطهر هكذا قبل التناول يزداد طهارة وقدساً، والذي يتناوله بغير توبة يناله مثال ما نال يهوذا لأنه لما تناوله لوقته دخل فيه الشيطان.

cells.english: Therefore, every Christian must be attentive and terrified that if he dares to partake of the body of Christ without repentance, he gives Satan the means to get into him, his heart will increasingly long for sin, and his fear of God will weaken.
cells.arabic: فليسمع ويفزع كل مسيحي أن كل من يجسر على تناول جسد المسيح بغير توبة فهو يعطي للشيطان سبيلاً أن يدخل فيه ويزداد قلبه للخطيئة حباً. وينقض منه خوف الله.

cells.english: On the other hand, he who takes communion after true repentance, Christ increases his love for virtue and hatred to sin, and his fear of God will grow.
cells.arabic: بعكس الذي يتناوله بتوبة نقية فان المسيح يزيده حباً للبر وبغضاً للخطيئة، ويزداد فيه خوف الله.

cells.english: Even though drying the feet causes them to get dirty faster, it denotes how important a person must remain very careful, in order to receive the holy communion. For when he partakes of the body and blood of Christ, he may reign with Christ forever, Amen.
cells.arabic: وقد أشار بتنشيف الرجلين من الماء الذي يجعلها يتسخان سريعاً من الأرض إلى شدة التحفظ التي تلزم الإنسان كل حين حتى يتناول جسد الرب ودمه بنقاوة ليملك مع المسيح إلى الأبد آمين.

title: God Have Mercy

cells.english: Jesus Christ is the same yesterday, today and forever, in one hypostasis, we worship Him and glorify Him.
cells.coptic: Ⲓⲏⲥⲟⲩⲥ Ⲡⲓⲭ̀ⲣⲓⲥⲧⲟⲥ ⲛ̀ⲥⲁϥ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲫⲟⲟⲩ: ⲛ̀ⲑⲟϥ ⲛ̀ⲑⲟϥ ⲡⲉ ⲛⲉⲙ ϣⲁ ⲉ̀ⲛⲉϩ: ϧⲉⲛ ⲟⲩϩⲩⲡⲟⲥⲧⲁⲥⲓⲥ ⲛ̀ⲟⲩⲱⲧ: ⲧⲉⲛⲟⲩⲱϣⲧ ⲙ̀ⲙⲟϥ ⲧⲉⲛϯⲱ̀ⲟⲩ ⲛⲁϥ.
cells.arabic: يسوع المسيح هو هو، أمساً واليوم وإلى الأبد، اقنوم واحد، نسجد له ونمجده.

cells.english: Blessed be the Father and the Son / and the Holy Spirit / the perfect Trinity / we worship Him and glorify Him.
cells.coptic: Ϫⲉ ϥ̀ⲥ̀ⲙⲁⲣⲱⲟⲩⲧ ⲛ̀ϫⲉ Ⲫⲓⲱⲧ ⲛⲉⲙ Ⲡϣⲏⲣⲓ: ⲛⲉⲙ Ⲡⲓⲡ̀ⲛⲉⲩⲙⲁ ⲉⲑⲟⲩⲁⲃ: Ϯⲧ̀ⲣⲓⲁⲥ ⲉⲧϫⲏⲕ ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗ: ⲧⲉⲛⲟⲩⲱϣⲧ ⲙ̀ⲙⲟⲥ ⲧⲉⲛϯⲱ̀ⲟⲩ ⲛⲁⲥ.
cells.arabic: لأنَّهُ مُبارَكٌ الآبُ والابنُ، والرُّوحُ القدُسُ، الثالوثُ الكامِلُ، نسجُدُ لهُ ونمجِّدُهُ.

cells.english: In the wisdom of God, let us attend. Lord have mercy. Lord have mercy. Truly…
cells.coptic: Ⲉⲛ ⲥⲟⲫⲓⲁ Ⲑⲉⲟⲩ ⲡ̀ⲣⲟⲥⲭⲱⲙⲉⲛ: Ⲕⲩⲣⲓⲉ ⲉ̀ⲗⲉⲏ̀ⲥⲟⲛ: Ⲕⲩⲣⲓⲉ ⲉ̀ⲗⲉⲏ̀ⲥⲟⲛ: ϧⲉⲛ ⲟⲩⲙⲉⲑⲙⲏⲓ...
cells.arabic: أنصتوا بحكمة الله، يارب إرحم، يارب إرحم. بالحقيقة...

title: The Orthodox Creed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: We believe in one God, God the Father, the Pantocrator, Creator of heaven and earth, and of all things seen and unseen.
cells.coptic: Ⲧⲉⲛⲛⲁϩϯ ⲉ̀ⲟⲩⲛⲟⲩϯ ⲛ̀ⲟⲩⲱⲧ: Ⲫⲛⲟⲩϯ Ⲫⲓⲱⲧ ⲡⲓⲡⲁⲛⲧⲟⲕⲣⲁⲧⲱⲣ: ⲫⲏⲉ̀ⲧⲁϥⲑⲁⲙⲓⲟ ⲛ̀ⲧ̀ⲫⲉ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲡ̀ⲕⲁϩⲓ: ⲛⲏⲉ̀ⲧⲟⲩⲛⲁⲩ ⲉ̀ⲣⲱⲟⲩ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲛⲏⲉ̀ⲧⲉ ⲛ̀ⲥⲉⲛⲁⲩ ⲉ̀ⲣⲱⲟⲩ ⲁⲛ.
cells.arabic: نؤمنُ بإلهٍ واحدٍ اللهِ الآبِ ضابطِ الكلِ خالقِ السماءِ والأرضِ. ما يُرَى وما لا يُرَى

cells.english: We believe in one Lord, Jesus Christ, the only-begotten Son of God, begotten of the Father before all ages.
cells.coptic: Ⲧⲉⲛⲛⲁϩϯ ⲉ̀ⲟⲩϭⲟⲓⲥ ⲛ̀ⲟⲩⲱⲧ Ⲓⲏⲥⲟⲩⲥ Ⲡⲓⲭ̀ⲣⲓⲥⲧⲟⲥ Ⲡϣⲏⲣⲓ ⲙ̀Ⲫⲛⲟⲩϯ ⲡⲓⲙⲟⲛⲟⲅⲉⲛⲏⲥ: ⲡⲓⲙⲓⲥⲓ ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗϧⲉⲛ Ⲫⲓⲱⲧ ϧⲁϫⲱⲟⲩ ⲛ̀ⲛⲓⲉ̀ⲱⲛ ⲧⲏⲣⲟⲩ:
cells.arabic: نؤمنُ بربٍ واحدٍ يسوعَ، المسيحِ، ابنِ اللهِ الوحيدِ المولودِ مِنَ الآبِ قبلَ كلِّ الدهورِ

cells.english: Light of Light, true God of true God; begotten, not created; of one essence with the Father; by whom all things were made.
cells.coptic: ⲟⲩⲟⲩⲱⲓⲛⲓ ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗϧⲉⲛ ⲟⲩⲟⲩⲱⲓⲛⲓ: ⲟⲩⲛⲟⲩϯ ⲛ̀ⲧⲁⲫ̀ⲙⲏⲓ ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗϧⲉⲛ ⲟⲩⲛⲟⲩϯ ⲛ̀ⲧⲁⲫ̀ⲙⲏⲓ: ⲟⲩⲙⲓⲥⲓ ⲡⲉ ⲟⲩⲑⲁⲙⲓⲟ ⲁⲛ ⲡⲉ ⲟⲩⲟ̀ⲙⲟⲟⲩⲥⲓⲟⲥ ⲡⲉ ⲛⲉⲙ Ⲫⲓⲱⲧ: ⲫⲏⲉ̀ⲧⲁ ϩⲱⲃ ⲛⲓⲃⲉⲛ ϣⲱⲡⲓ ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗ ϩⲓⲧⲟⲧϥ.
cells.arabic: نورٍ مِنْ نورٍ إلهِ حقٍ مِنْ إلهِ حقٍ، مولودٍ غيرِ مخلوقٍ، مساوٍ للآبِ في الجوهرِ الذي بِهِ كانَ كلُّ شيءٍ

cells.english: Who for us men and for our salvation came down from heaven, was incarnate of the Holy Spirit and of the Virgin Mary, and became man.
cells.coptic: Ⲫⲁⲓ ⲉ̀ⲧⲉ ⲉⲑⲃⲏⲧⲉⲛ ⲁ̀ⲛⲟⲛ ϧⲁ ⲛⲓⲣⲱⲙⲓ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲉⲑⲃⲉ ⲡⲉⲛⲟⲩϫⲁⲓ: ⲁϥⲓ̀ ⲉ̀ⲡⲉⲥⲏⲧ ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗϧⲉⲛ ⲧ̀ⲫⲉ: ⲁϥϭⲓⲥⲁⲣⲝ ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗϧⲉⲛ Ⲡⲓⲡ̀ⲛⲉⲩⲙⲁ ⲉⲑⲟⲩⲁⲃ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗϧⲉⲛ Ⲙⲁⲣⲓⲁ ϯⲡⲁⲣⲑⲉⲛⲟⲥ ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲁϥⲉⲣⲣⲱⲙⲓ.
cells.arabic: هذا الذي مِنْ أجلِنا نحنُ البشرَ ومِنْ أجلِ خلاصِنا نزِلَ مِنَ السماءِ وتجسدَ مِنَ الرّوحِ القُدُسِ ومِنْ مريمَ العذراءِ وتأنسَ

cells.english: Yes, we believe in the Holy Spirit, the Lord, the Giver of Life, who proceeds from the Father, who with the Father and the Son, is worshiped and glorified, who spoke by the prophets.
cells.coptic: Ⲥⲉ ⲧⲉⲛⲛⲁϩϯ ⲉ̀Ⲡⲓⲡ̀ⲛⲉⲩⲙⲁ ⲉⲑⲟⲩⲁⲃ Ⲡϭⲟⲓⲥ ⲛ̀ⲣⲉϥϯ ⲙ̀ⲡ̀ⲱⲛϧ: ⲫⲏⲉⲑⲛⲏⲟⲩ ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗϧⲉⲛ Ⲫ̀ⲓⲱⲧ: ⲥⲉⲟⲩⲱϣⲧ ⲙ̀ⲙⲟϥ ⲥⲉϯ ⲱ̀ⲟⲩ ⲛⲁϥ ⲛⲉⲙ Ⲫⲓⲱⲧ ⲛⲉⲙ Ⲡϣⲏⲣⲓ: ⲫⲏⲉ̀ⲧⲁϥⲥⲁϫⲓ ϧⲉⲛ ⲛⲓⲡ̀ⲣⲟⲫⲏⲧⲏⲥ.
cells.arabic: نَعَم نؤمنُ بالرّوحِ القُدُسِ الربِّ المحيي المنبثقِ مِنَ الآبِ، نسجدُ لهُ ونمجدُهُ معَ الآبِ والابنِ الناطقِ في الأنبياءِ

cells.english: And in one holy, catholic (universal), and apostolic Church. We confess one baptism, for the remission of sins.
cells.coptic: Ⲉⲟⲩⲓ ⲛ̀ⲁ̀ⲅⲓⲁ ⲛ̀ⲕⲁⲑⲟⲗⲓⲕⲏ ⲛ̀ⲁ̀ⲡⲟⲥⲧⲟⲗⲓⲕⲏ ⲛ̀ⲉⲕⲕ̀ⲗⲏⲥⲓⲁ̀. Ⲧⲉⲛⲉⲣⲟ̀ⲙⲟⲗⲟⲅⲓⲛ ⲛ̀ⲟⲩⲱⲙⲥ ⲛ̀ⲟⲩⲱⲧ ⲉ̀ⲡ̀ⲭⲱ ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲛⲓⲛⲟⲃⲓ.
cells.arabic: وبكنيسةٍ واحدةٍ مُقدسَةٍ جامعةٍ رسوليةٍ. ونعترفُ بمعموديةٍ واحدةٍ لمغفِرةِ الخطايا

cells.english: We look for the resurrection of the dead, and the life of the age to come. Amen.
cells.coptic: Ⲧⲉⲛϫⲟⲩϣⲧ ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗ ϧⲁⲧ̀ϩⲏ ⲛ̀ϯⲁ̀ⲛⲁⲥⲧⲁⲥⲓⲥ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲛⲓⲣⲉϥⲙⲱⲟⲩⲧ: ⲛⲉⲙ ⲡⲓⲱⲛϧ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲡⲓⲉ̀ⲱⲛ ⲉⲑⲛⲏⲟⲩ: ⲁ̀ⲙⲏⲛ.
cells.arabic: وننتظرُ قيامةَ الأمواتِ، وحياةَ الدهرِ الآتي. آمين.

title: Adam Aspasmos
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Rejoice and be glad, O human race, for God so loved the world.
cells.coptic: Rⲁϣⲓ ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲑⲉⲗⲏⲗ: ⲱ̀ⲡ̀ⲅⲉⲛⲟⲥ ⲛ̀ⲛⲓⲣⲱⲙⲓ: ϫⲉ ⲡⲁⲓⲣⲏϯ ⲁ̀Ⲫϯ ⲙⲉⲛⲣⲉ ⲡⲓⲕⲟⲥⲙⲟⲥ.
cells.arabic: أفرحوا وﺗﻬللوا يا جنس البشر ، لأنه هكذا أحب االله العالم.

cells.english: That He gave His Beloved Son, for His faithful, that they may live forever.
cells.coptic: Hⲱⲥⲧⲉ ⲛⲧ̀ⲉϥϯ ⲙⲡ̀ⲉϥϣⲏⲣⲓ ⲙⲙ̀ⲉⲛⲣⲓⲧ ϧⲁ ⲛⲏⲉⲑⲛⲁϩϯ ⲉⲣ̀ⲟϥ ⲉⲑⲣⲟⲩⲱⲛϧ ϣⲁ ⲉⲛ̀ⲉϩ.
cells.arabic: حتى بذل إبنه الحبيب ، عنالمؤمنين لكى يحيوا إلى الأبد.

title: Alternate Adam Aspasmos
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Our fathers the apostles / preached to the nations / with the gospel / of Jesus Christ.
cells.coptic: Ⲛⲉⲛⲓⲟϯ ⲛ̀ⲁ̀ⲡⲟⲥⲧⲟⲗⲟⲥ ⲁⲩϩⲓⲱⲓϣ ϧⲉⲛ ⲛⲓⲉⲑⲛⲟⲥ: ϧⲉⲛ ⲡⲓⲉⲩⲁⲅⲅⲉⲗⲓⲟⲛ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ Ⲓⲏⲥⲟⲩⲥ Ⲡⲓⲭ̀ⲣⲓⲥⲧⲟⲥ.
cells.arabic: أباؤنا الرسل كرزوا فى الأمم بإنجيل يسوع المسيح.

cells.english: Their voice went forth / upon the face of the whole earth / and their words have reached / the ends of the world.
cells.coptic: Ⲁⲡⲟⲩϧ̀ⲣⲱⲟⲩ ϣⲉⲛⲁϥ ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗ: ϩⲓϫⲉⲛ ⲡ̀ϩⲟ ⲙ̀ⲡ̀ⲕⲁϩⲓ ⲧⲏⲣϥ: ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲛⲟⲩⲥⲁϫⲓ ⲁⲩⲫⲟϩ: ϣⲁ ⲁⲩⲣⲏϫⲥ ⲛ̀ϯⲟⲓⲕⲟⲩⲙⲉⲛⲏ.
cells.arabic: خرجَت أصواتُهُم، إلى وجهِ الأرضِ كلِّها، وبلغَ كلامُهُم، إلى أقطارِ المسكونةِ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Offer, [offer, offer] in order. Stand with trembling. Look toward the East. Let us attend.
cells.coptic: Ⲡⲣⲟⲥⲫⲉⲣⲓⲛ: ⲡⲣⲟⲥⲫⲉⲣⲓⲛ: ⲡⲣⲟⲥⲫⲉⲣⲓⲛ ⲕⲁⲧⲁ ⲧ̀ⲣⲟⲡⲟⲛ: ⲥ̀ⲧⲁⲑⲏⲧⲉ ⲕⲁⲧⲁ ⲧ̀ⲣⲟⲙⲟⲩ: ⲓⲥ ⲁ̀ⲛⲁⲧⲟⲗⲁⲥ ⲃ̀ⲗⲉⲯⲁⲧⲉ: ⲡ̀ⲣⲟⲥⲭⲱⲙⲉⲛ.
cells.arabic: تقدموا. [تقدموا. تقدموا] على الرسمِ، قفوا برعدةٍ، وإلى الشرقِ انظروا. ننصِتْ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Greet one another with a holy kiss.
cells.coptic: Ⲁⲥⲡⲁⲍⲉⲥⲑⲉ ⲁⲗⲗⲏⲗⲟⲩⲥ ⲉⲛ ⲫⲓⲗⲏⲙⲁⲧⲓ ⲁⲅⲓⲱ.
cells.arabic: قبلوا بعضكم بعضا بقبلة مقدسة

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Lord have mercy. Lord have mercy. Lord have mercy.
cells.coptic: Ⲕⲩⲣⲓⲉ ⲉ̀ⲗⲉⲏ̀ⲥⲟⲛ: Ⲕⲩⲣⲓⲉ ⲉ̀ⲗⲉⲏ̀ⲥⲟⲛ: Ⲕⲩⲣⲓⲉ ⲉ̀ⲗⲉⲏ̀ⲥⲟⲛ.
cells.arabic: ياربُّ ارحَم. ياربُّ ارحَم. ياربُّ ارحَم.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Yes, Lord, who are Jesus Christ, the Son of God, hear us and have mercy upon us.
cells.coptic: Ⲥⲉ Ⲕⲩⲣⲓⲉ: ⲉ̀ⲧⲉ ⲫⲁⲓ ⲡⲉ Ⲓⲏⲥⲟⲩⲥ Ⲡⲓⲭ̀ⲣⲓⲥⲧⲟⲥ Ⲡϣⲏⲣⲓ ⲙ̀Ⲫⲛⲟⲩϯ: ⲥⲱⲧⲉⲙ ⲉ̀ⲣⲟⲛ ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲛⲁⲓ ⲛⲁⲛ.
cells.arabic: نعم ياربُّ، الذي هو يسوعُ المسيحُ ابنُ اللهِ، اسمعْنا وارحَمْنا.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Offer, [offer, offer] in order. Stand with trembling. Look toward the East. Let us attend.
cells.coptic: Ⲡⲣⲟⲥⲫⲉⲣⲓⲛ: ⲡⲣⲟⲥⲫⲉⲣⲓⲛ: ⲡⲣⲟⲥⲫⲉⲣⲓⲛ ⲕⲁⲧⲁ ⲧ̀ⲣⲟⲡⲟⲛ: ⲥ̀ⲧⲁⲑⲏⲧⲉ ⲕⲁⲧⲁ ⲧ̀ⲣⲟⲙⲟⲩ: ⲓⲥ ⲁ̀ⲛⲁⲧⲟⲗⲁⲥ ⲃ̀ⲗⲉⲯⲁⲧⲉ: ⲡ̀ⲣⲟⲥⲭⲱⲙⲉⲛ.
cells.arabic: تقدموا. [تقدموا. تقدموا] على الرسمِ، قفوا برعدةٍ، وإلى الشرقِ انظروا. ننصِتْ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Let us stand well, let us stand reverently, let us stand earnestly, let us stand in peace, let us stand in the fear of God, trembling and stunned.
cells.coptic: Ⲥⲧⲱⲙⲉⲛ ⲕⲁⲗⲱⲥ: ⲥ̀ⲧⲱⲙⲉⲛ ⲉⲩⲗⲁⲃⲱⲥ: ⲥ̀ⲧⲱⲙⲉⲛ ⲉⲕⲧⲉⲛⲱⲥ: ⲥ̀ⲧⲱⲙⲉⲛ ⲉⲛ ⲓ̀ⲣⲏⲛⲏ: ⲥ̀ⲧⲱⲙⲉⲛ ⲙⲉⲧⲁ ⲫⲟⲃⲟⲩ Ⲑⲉⲟⲩ ⲕⲉ ⲧ̀ⲣⲟⲙⲟⲩ ⲕⲉ ⲕⲁⲧⲁⲛⲩⲝⲉⲱⲥ.
cells.arabic: فلنقفْ حسناً، لنقفْ بتقوَى، نقفْ باتصالٍ، نقفْ بسلامٍ، نقفْ بخوفِ اللهِ ورعدةٍ وخُشُوعٍ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Offer in order. Stand with trembling. Look toward the East. Let us attend.
cells.coptic: Ⲡⲣⲟⲥⲫⲉⲣⲓⲛ ⲕⲁⲧⲁ ⲧ̀ⲣⲟⲡⲟⲛ: ⲥ̀ⲧⲁⲑⲏⲧⲉ ⲕⲁⲧⲁ ⲧ̀ⲣⲟⲙⲟⲩ: ⲓⲥ ⲁ̀ⲛⲁⲧⲟⲗⲁⲥ ⲃ̀ⲗⲉⲯⲁⲧⲉ: ⲡ̀ⲣⲟⲥⲭⲱⲙⲉⲛ.
cells.arabic: تقدموا على الرسمِ، قفوا برعدةٍ، وإلى الشرقِ انظروا. ننصِتْ.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Offer, offer, offer in order. Stand with trembling. Look toward the East. Let us attend.
cells.coptic: Ⲡⲣⲟⲥⲫⲉⲣⲓⲛ: ⲡⲣⲟⲥⲫⲉⲣⲓⲛ: ⲡⲣⲟⲥⲫⲉⲣⲓⲛ ⲕⲁⲧⲁ ⲧ̀ⲣⲟⲡⲟⲛ: ⲥ̀ⲧⲁⲑⲏⲧⲉ ⲕⲁⲧⲁ ⲧ̀ⲣⲟⲙⲟⲩ: ⲓⲥ ⲁ̀ⲛⲁⲧⲟⲗⲁⲥ ⲃ̀ⲗⲉⲯⲁⲧⲉ: ⲡ̀ⲣⲟⲥⲭⲱⲙⲉⲛ.
cells.arabic: تقدموا. تقدموا. تقدموا على الرسمِ، قفوا برعدةٍ، وإلى الشرقِ انظروا. ننصِتْ.

title: Greet One Another (Great)
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Greet one another with a holy kiss.
cells.coptic: Ⲁⲥⲡⲁⲍⲉⲥⲑⲉ ⲁⲗⲗⲏⲗⲟⲩⲥ ⲉⲛ ⲫⲓⲗⲏⲙⲁⲧⲓ ⲁ̀ⲅⲓⲱ.
cells.arabic: قبلوا بعضكم بعضا بقبلة مقدسة

cells.english: Amen. Lord have mercy. Lord have mercy. Lord have mercy. O Lord Jesus Christ, Son of God, hear us and have mercy upon us.
cells.coptic: Ⲁⲙⲏⲛ. Ⲕⲩⲣⲓⲉ ⲉ̀ⲗⲉⲏ̀ⲥⲟⲛ Ⲕⲩⲣⲓⲉ ⲉ̀ⲗⲉⲏ̀ⲥⲟⲛ Ⲕⲩⲣⲓⲉ ⲉ̀ⲗⲉⲏ̀ⲥⲟⲛ ⲉ̀ⲧⲉ ⲫⲁⲓ ⲡⲉ Ⲓⲏⲥⲟⲩⲥ Ⲡⲓⲭ̀ⲣⲓⲥⲧⲟⲥ Ⲡϣⲏⲣⲓ ⲙ̀Ⲫⲛⲟⲩϯ ⲥⲱⲧⲉⲙ ⲉ̀ⲣⲟⲛ ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲛⲁⲓ ⲛⲁⲛ.
cells.arabic: يارب إرحم يارب إرحم يارب إرحم نعم يارب الذي هو يسوع المسيح ابن الله اسمعنا وارحمنا

cells.english: Let us stand commendably, let us stand reverently, let us stand resolutely, let us stand in peace, let us stand in the fear of God, trembling and transfixed.
cells.coptic: Ⲥⲧⲱⲙⲉⲛ ⲕⲁⲗⲱⲥ: ⲥ̀ⲧⲱⲙⲉⲛ ⲉⲩⲗⲁⲃⲱⲥ: ⲥ̀ⲧⲱⲙⲉⲛ ⲉⲕⲧⲉⲛⲱⲥ: ⲥ̀ⲧⲱⲙⲉⲛ ⲉⲛⲓ̀ⲣⲏⲛⲏ: ⲥ̀ⲧⲱⲙⲉⲛ ⲙⲉⲧⲁ ⲫⲟⲃⲟⲩ Ⲑⲉⲟⲩ ⲕⲉ ⲧ̀ⲣⲟⲙⲟⲩ ⲕⲉ ⲕⲁⲧⲁ ⲛⲩⲝⲉⲱⲥ.
cells.arabic: فلنقف حسنا ، لنقف بتقوى ، نقف باتصال نقف بسلام ، نقف بخوف الله ورعدة وخشوع.

cells.english: O clergy and all the people, with prayer and thanksgiving, with dignity and silence, raise your eyes toward the East:
cells.coptic: Ⲡⲓⲕ̀ⲗⲏⲣⲟⲥ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲡⲓⲗⲁⲟⲥ ⲧⲏⲣϥ ϧⲉⲛ ⲟⲩⲧⲱⲃϩ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲟⲩϣⲉⲡϩ̀ⲙⲟⲧ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲟⲩⲥⲉⲙⲛⲓ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲟⲩⲭⲁⲣⲱϥ. Ϥⲁⲓ ⲛ̀ⲛⲉⲧⲉⲛⲃⲁⲗ ⲉ̀ⲡ̀ϣⲱⲓ ⲉ̀ⲡ̀ⲥⲁ ⲛ̀ϯⲁ̀ⲛⲁⲧⲟⲗⲏ:
cells.arabic: أيها الإكليروس وكل الشعب بطلبة وشكر، بهدوء وسكوت. ارفعوا أعينكم ناحية المشرق:

cells.english: To see the Altar, and the Body and Blood of Immanuel our God placed upon it. The angels and archangels are standing,
cells.coptic: Ⲛⲧⲉⲧⲉⲛⲛⲁⲩ ⲉⲡⲓⲑⲩⲥⲓⲁⲥⲧⲏⲣⲓⲟⲛ: ⲉ̀ⲣⲉ ⲡⲓⲥⲱⲙⲁ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲡⲓⲥ̀ⲛⲟϥ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ Ⲉⲙⲙⲁⲛⲟⲩⲏⲗ Ⲡⲉⲛⲛⲟⲩϯ ⲭⲏ ⲉ̀ϩ̀ⲣⲏⲓ ⲉ̀ϫⲱϥ. Ⲉⲣⲉ ⲛⲓⲁⲅⲅⲉⲗⲟⲥ ⲟ̀ϩⲓ ⲉ̀ⲣⲁⲧⲟⲩ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲛⲓⲁⲣⲭⲓⲁⲅⲅⲉⲗⲟⲥ:
cells.arabic: لتنظروا المذبح وجسد ودم عمانوئيل إلهنا موضوعين عليه. الملائكة ورؤساء الملائكة قيام.

cells.english: the seraphim with six wings and the cherubim full of eyes are covering their faces because of the splendor of His great glory, which is invisible and ineffable,
cells.coptic: Ⲛⲓⲥⲉⲣⲁⲫⲓⲙ ⲛⲁ ⲡⲓⲥⲟⲟⲩ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉⲛϩ: ⲛⲉⲙ ⲛⲓⲭⲉⲣⲟⲩⲃⲓⲙ ⲉⲑⲙⲉϩ ⲙ̀ⲃⲁⲗ: ⲉⲩϩⲱⲃⲥ ⲛ̀ⲛⲟⲩϩⲟ ⲉⲑⲃⲉ ⲑ̀ⲙⲉⲧⲥⲁⲓⲉ̀ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲡⲉϥⲛⲓϣϯ ⲛ̀ⲱ̀ⲟⲩ ⲛ̀ⲁⲧϣ̀ⲉⲣⲑⲉⲱⲣⲓⲛ ⲙ̀ⲙⲟϥ ⲟⲩⲟϩ ⲛ̀ⲁⲧϣ̀ⲥⲁϫⲓ ⲙ̀ⲙⲟϥ:
cells.arabic: السيرافيم ذوو الستة أجنحة والشاروبيم الممتلئون أعينا يسترون وجوههم من بهاء عظمة مجده غير المنظور ولا منطوق به،

cells.english: praising in one voice, proclaiming and saying: “Holy, holy, holy, Lord of hosts, heaven and earth are full of Your holy glory.”
cells.coptic: Ⲉⲩϩⲱⲥ ϧⲉⲛ ⲟⲩⲥ̀ⲙⲏ ⲛ̀ⲟⲩⲱⲧ: ⲉⲩⲱϣ ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗ ⲉⲩϫⲱ ⲙ̀ⲙⲟⲥ: ϫⲉ ⲁ̀ⲅⲓⲟⲥ ⲁ̀ⲅⲓⲟⲥ ⲁ̀ⲅⲓⲟⲥ Ⲕⲩⲣⲓⲟⲥ ⲥⲁⲃⲁⲱⲑ: ⲡ̀ⲗⲏⲣⲏⲥ ⲟ̀ ⲟⲩⲣⲁⲛⲟⲥ ⲕⲉ ⲏ̀ⲅⲏ ⲧⲏⲥ ⲁ̀ⲅⲓⲁⲥ ⲥⲟⲩ ⲇⲟⲝⲏⲥ.
cells.arabic: يسبحون بصوت واحد صارخين قائلين: قدوس قدوس قدوس رب الصباؤوت السماء والأرض مملوءتان من مجدك الأقدس.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Through the intercessions, of the Theotokos Saint Mary, O Lord grant us, the forgiveness of our sins.
cells.coptic: Hⲓⲧⲉⲛ ⲛⲓⲡ̀ⲣⲉⲥⲃⲓⲁ: ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ϯⲑⲉⲟ̀ⲧⲟⲕⲟⲥ ⲉⲑⲟⲩⲁⲃ Ⲙⲁⲣⲓⲁ: Ⲡϭⲟⲓⲥ ⲁ̀ⲣⲓϩ̀ⲙⲟⲧ ⲛⲁⲛ: ⲙ̀ⲡⲓⲭⲱ ⲉ̀ⲃⲟⲗ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲛⲉⲛⲛⲟⲃⲓ.
cells.arabic: بشفاعاتِ والِدةِ، الإلهِ القدِّيسةِ مريمَ، يا ربُّ أنعِمْ لَنا، بمغفِرةِ خطايانا.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: We worship You O Christ, with Your good Father, and the Holy Spirit, for You were born and saved us.
cells.coptic: Ⲧⲉⲛⲟⲩⲱϣⲧ ⲙ̀ⲙⲟⲕ ⲱ̀ Ⲡⲓⲭ̀ⲣⲓⲥⲧⲟⲥ: ⲛⲉⲙ Ⲡⲉⲕⲓⲱⲧ ⲛ̀ⲁ̀ⲅⲁⲑⲟⲥ: ⲛⲉⲙ Ⲡⲓⲡ̀ⲛⲉⲩⲙⲁ ⲉⲑⲟⲩⲁⲃ: ϫⲉ ⲁⲩⲙⲁⲥⲕ ⲁⲕⲥⲱϯ ⲙ̀ⲙⲟⲛ.
cells.arabic: نسجدُ لكَ أيها المسيحُ، معَ أبيكَ الصالِحِ، والرُّوحِ القُدُسِ، لأنَّكَ وُلِدتَ وخلَّصتَنا.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed

cells.english: We worship You O Christ, with Your good Father, and the Holy Spirit, for You were baptized and saved us.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed

cells.english: Meet and right, meet and right; truly indeed it is meet and right. We praise You, we exalt You, we bless You, we glorify You, we worship You. We thank You at all times for all Your works You have done for us. You alone are the True God, who exists from the beginning, and who formed water from His heights.
cells.arabic: مستحق ومستوجب مستحق ومستوجب لأنه حقاً بالحقيقة مستحق ومستوجب. لأنك بالحقيقة مستحق وعادل، أكرمك، أرفعك، أباركك، أمجدك، أسجد لك، أشكرك فى كل زمان لأجل الخيرات التى صنعتها معنا. أنت الإله الحقيقى وحدك. الكائن منذ البدء الذي أظهر المياه فى علاليه.

title: Liturgy of the Waters.fixed
seasons: Feasts ^ FeastsOfTheLordPeriods ^ MinorFeastsOfTheLord ^ CovenantThursday ^ Fasts ^ PaschaWeek ^ WatosDays ^ Weekdays ^ Thursdays ^ FuneralTune ^ SeasonOfAirAndFruits

cells.english: Who made the water in the firmament that blesses Your holy name, O King of all creation, Lord Jesus Christ, we worship You. You who sits on the throne of His glory and is worshiped by all the holy powers.
cells.arabic: الذي جعل المياه الكثيرة فى فلك السماء، هذه تبارك اسمك القدوس يا ملك الخليقة كلها، يا يسوع المسيح نسجد لك. أيها الجالس على كرسى مجده، الذي تسجد له جميع القوآتٍ المقدسة.

cells.english: The angels, the archangels, the principalities, the authorities, the thrones, the dominions, all the serving spirits and all the infinite multitude of angelic powers, who stand before You in fear and trembling, praising Your Majesty.
cells.arabic: ان الملائكة ورؤساء الملائكة والرئاسآتِ والسلطاتِ والكراسي والربواتِ. وكل الأرواح الخدام، وكل الجمع غير المُحصى من القواتِ الملائكية هؤلاء القيام أمامك بخوف ورعدة يسبحون عظمتك.

cells.english: You are He around whom stand the blessed powers; the cherubim and the seraphim thrice glorifying You. Wherefore we also, make us worthy to join their praises and bless you with the voices full of glory saying:
cells.arabic: أنت هو الذي يقف حولك القواتِ الطوباويين: الشاروبيم والسيرافيم هؤلاء يقدسونك ثلاث مراتِ فى كل حين. ونحن أيضاً اجعلنا مستحقين أن نسبحك معهم ونباركك بأصواتِ المجد قائلين:

cells.arabic: قدوس. قدوس. قدوس. رب الصاباؤوت. السماء والأرض مملوءتان من مجدك الأقدس
